response: Hershel Greene and Carl Grimes appear in the comic book series "The Walking Dead," which is based on the same fictional universe depicted in the television series. In both the comic book and television series, Hershel Greene is the widowed owner of a farm in Georgia and is portrayed as a devout Christian with a strong sense of morality and protection for his family. Carl Grimes is the son of Rick Grimes and is one of the longest-surviving characters in the series, having been introduced in "The Walking Dead" #2 in 2003. Both characters are central to the narrative and are part of the main storyline of the comic book series.
